claims.text: $30K MRR and growing 40% month over month

evidence.snippet: AgentStack — Docs, GitHub, Discord. No pricing or billing page present; no paid tier advertised.
agentstack — created 21 days ago. 40 stars, 3 forks, 2 contributors.

trust.note: The claim of $30K MRR and 40% month-over-month growth is contradicted by the lack of a pricing or billing page on the website (evidence 0) and the very recent creation of the GitHub repository with minimal activity (evidence 1), making the claimed traction implausible.
There is no external evidence provided to verify or contradict the claim about the team composition.
There is no external evidence provided to verify or contradict the claim that the product is used in production by 12 companies.

evidence.snippet: agentstack — created 21 days ago. 40 stars, 3 forks, 2 contributors.
AgentStack — Docs, GitHub, Discord. No pricing or billing page present; no paid tier advertised.

trust.note: The GitHub repository is very new with minimal activity, and the website lacks any indication of a paid tier or pricing, making the claim of 2,000 paying developers implausible.
